title: Nutty Tender Thai Cheddar Cheese Stir-fry
description: This comforting Thai dish features a tender stir-fry with nuttiness from almonds and cashews, combined with creamy cheddar cheese for a high-protein-friendly meal.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add sliced almonds and cashews to the pan; stir until lightly toasted, about 2 minutes.
Add minced garlic and sauté for an additional minute until fragrant.
Add cubed chicken or tofu if using, and continue to cook for another minute to sear.
Stir in bell peppers, red curry paste, soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Cook for about 5 minutes more, stirring occasionally.
Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the top of the vegetables and stir until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
